message:
fix(abi): remove 175 duplicate #[no_mangle] symbol definitions

Multiple agents independently defined the same extern "C" functions across
different ABI modules, causing linker errors in workspace builds. This patch
removes duplicates by keeping each symbol in its canonical module:

- unistd_abi.rs: removed 70 duplicates (glibc_internal, stdlib, wchar,
  pwd, locale, inet, resolv, fortify, stdio symbols)
- glibc_internal_abi.rs: removed 43 duplicates (string, pthread, fortify,
  wchar symbols)
- stdlib_abi.rs: removed 32 duplicates (search, isoc, err symbols + dead
  hash table/QElem support code)
- wchar_abi.rs: removed 16 duplicates (isoc_abi __isoc23_* wide symbols)
- stdio_abi.rs: removed 11 duplicates (isoc_abi scanf + fortify_abi _chk)
- malloc_abi.rs: removed 3 duplicates (__libc_init_first, __libc_sa_len,
  __libc_allocate_rtsig)
- startup_abi.rs: removed 1 duplicate (__stack_chk_fail)

Also fixes:
- _Exit duplicate definition (already existed as frankenlibc_exit_immediate)
- Dead code cleanup (CONFSTR_PATH, confstr_value, normalized_nprocs,
  sysinfo_pages, WctypeT, HashSlot, HTAB, hash_key, HashTableR, QElem)
- Flaky get_avphys_pages test (tolerance for RAM fluctuation)
- Test import paths updated for moved symbols

cargo test --workspace now passes (461 tests, 0 failures).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
